task_completion.description: The Vertical Tank ('T-100'), Centrifugal Pump ('P-101'), and Shell and Tube Heat Exchanger ('E-102') are added to the diagram.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The EdrawMax canvas shows a tank shape labeled 'T-100', a pump shape labeled 'P-101', and a heat exchanger shape labeled 'E-102'.

task_completion.description: The title 'Unit 100: Feed Pre-heating Loop' is added at the top of the diagram.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Unit 100: Feed Pre-heating Loop' is visible at the top of the EdrawMax canvas.

task_completion.description: Flow paths are established between the equipment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Connector lines link the bottom of Tank 'T-100' to Pump 'P-101', Pump 'P-101' to Heat Exchanger 'E-102', and an outlet line with an arrow leaves the Heat Exchanger.

task_completion.description: The required valves are placed on the flow paths.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Gate Valve symbol is on the line between the tank and pump, a Check Valve symbol is immediately after the pump, and a Control Valve symbol is on the line entering the heat exchanger.

task_completion.description: The project is saved as an EDDX file in the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The EdrawMax window title shows 'pid_unit100', a save dialog shows the path '/home/ga/Diagrams/pid_unit100.eddx', or a file manager shows the file.

task_completion.description: The diagram is exported as a PDF file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An export dialog shows the path '/home/ga/Diagrams/pid_unit100.pdf', a PDF viewer displays the diagram, or a file manager shows the PDF file.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent used the EdrawMax GUI to create the diagram.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the EdrawMax application interface, shape libraries, and canvas, rather than terminal commands or text editors.

integrity.description: Verifies the diagram was built using individual shapes and connectors.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show individual shapes being dragged, dropped, and connected, rather than a single pre-made image being pasted onto the canvas.

integrity.description: Verifies the files were saved and exported using the application's menus.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the 'Save As' and 'Export' dialogs in EdrawMax being used to generate the final files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output file paths are /home/ga/Diagrams/pid_unit100.eddx and /home/ga/Diagrams/pid_unit100.pdf. The required text labels are 'T-100', 'P-101', 'E-102', and 'Unit 100: Feed Pre-heating Loop'. The required shape keywords are Valve, Pump, Tank, and Exchanger.
